name: Is neck surgery covered if work caused it in West Valley?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, with causation proof; appeal denials.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if causally linked and authorized or emergency.[2] Key factors: (1) Pre-approval usually needed; (2) Denials appealable; (3) Neel rate may apply. Fight unreasonable refusals. Full medical paid.
